$comment: Stage 3 Group A model manifest template (GAP-04). Every value is a PLACEHOLDER. Copy to model_manifest.json alongside the exported MNN model files and fill every field before scripts/jetson_verify_model_manifest.py will accept it. 2B and 4B must each get their own manifest — never share one manifest between two model selections.
model_name: <REPLACE: e.g. qwen3-vl-2b-instruct — must match the approved Group A selection in docs/STAGE3_AB_TESTING_SPEC.md>
model_alias: <REPLACE: the configured alias this deployment will report, e.g. qwen3-vl-2b-mnn>
upstream_revision: <REPLACE: exact upstream model revision/commit/tag this export was built from>
quantization: <REPLACE: e.g. int4 — must be explicit, never omitted or 'default'>

files.path: <REPLACE: filename relative to the model directory, e.g. model.mnn>

min_memory_mb: <REPLACE: integer — minimum device RAM this export requires to load>
target_mnn_sdk_commit: <REPLACE: must match deploy/jetson/mnn-sdk.lock.json git_commit — an export built against a different MNN SDK commit is not this deployment's approved pairing>
source: <REPLACE: where this export was obtained from>
known_limitations: <REPLACE: e.g. 'not evaluated on low-light images' — leave the array present even if empty, do not omit the field>
approved_by: <REPLACE: name/handle of the person who approved this model selection>
